source_text: Dive into the Water Festival with returning Psyduck in a swim ring, plus the Pokemon GO debuts of Cramorant, Arrokuda, and Barraskewda! The Water Festival event will take place from August 18, 2026 at 10 am to August 24, 2026 at 8 pm local time.
